title: Palace (disambiguation)
content:
'''Palaces''' may refer to the following items:

==Palaces==
[[File:WheetaPalace-LoNH.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Wheeta Palace on Nal Hutta]]
*'''[[Central Palace]]''' on [[Ootoola]]
*'''[[Council of Elders' palace]]''' on [[Klatooine/Legends|Klatooine]]
*'''[[Darth Vader's Palace]]''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The '''[[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]]''' on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*'''[[Eriadu Governor's Palace]]''' on [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]
*'''[[Fountain Palace]]''' on [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]
*[[Governor's palace (Malastare)|'''Governor's palace''']] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]
*'''[[Imperial Station Bravo|Gardulla's Palace]]''' on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*The '''[[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]]''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The '''[[Irmenu imperial palace]]''' on [[Irmenu]]
*'''[[Iziz Royal Palace]]''' on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]
*'[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|''Jabba's Palace''']] on Tatooine
*Governor '''[[Linrec's palace]]''' somewhere in the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]]
*'''[[Malgrin Palace]]''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]
*'''[[The Palace]]''' on Procopia
*'''[[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]]''' on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*Various '''[[Consortium palace]]s'''
*'''[[Hutt palace of Teth|Wanbo's Palace]]''' on [[Teth]]
*'''[[Wheeta Palace/Legends|Wheeta Palace]]''' on [[Nal Hutta]]
*'''[[Xizor's Palace]]''' on Coruscant

==Other locations==
*The '''[[Palace District]]''' on Coruscant, which contained the Imperial Palace
*The '''[[Palace Hotel]]''' on [[Naos III/Legends|Naos III]]
*'''[[Palace Plaza/Legends|Palace Plaza]]''', the avenue in front of the Theed Royal Palace
